# StackPanel

**Status:** Stable  
**Category:** layout  
**Import:** `drawui`  
**Emitted class(es):** `Row`, `Column`

Flex row or column container.

_Source: `src/primitives/ui.js`_

## Import

```js
import { StackPanel } from "drawui";
```

## Examples

### StackPanel (row)

```js
return new StackPanel({ isVertical: false })
  .gap("0.5rem")
  .add(new Badge("Row"))
  .add(new Badge("Layout"));
```

<div class="doc-live-demo" data-live-demo="StackPanel/stackpanel-row" aria-label="Live preview"></div>

### StackPanel (column)

```js
return new StackPanel({ isVertical: true })
  .gap("0.25rem")
  .add(new TextBlock("Column A"))
  .add(new TextBlock("Column B"));
```

<div class="doc-live-demo" data-live-demo="StackPanel/stackpanel-column" aria-label="Live preview"></div>
